sourcePurpose: Quarterly financial statements (EPS, net income, gross margin, operating margin) for Taiwan-listed stocks, available after MOPS filing date. Used to compute earnings trend and fundamental quality context.

possibleSourceTypes.description: 公開資訊觀測站 (MOPS) financial statement downloads
possibleSourceTypes.notes: Must capture filingDate (公告日期) from MOPS page header, NOT the report period end date

possibleSourceTypes.description: Operator manually constructs CSV from official MOPS disclosures
possibleSourceTypes.reliability: HIGH if sourced from MOPS with filingDate captured
possibleSourceTypes.notes: Preferred for initial acquisition; requires operator to record filingDate per row

possibleSourceTypes.description: Commercial APIs (e.g., TEJ, Fugle API) that provide structured financial data
possibleSourceTypes.reliability: MEDIUM — verify filingDate is MOPS filing date, not period end date
possibleSourceTypes.notes: Not recommended for initial acquisition without filingDate provenance audit

mandatory.description: MOPS public disclosure date — THE PIT gate field. NOT period end date.
Earnings per share for the quarter
MOPS URL or reference to original disclosure page

optional.description: Checksum of source file for audit trail

forbidden.reason: NOT a valid PIT gate — is the end of the reporting period, not the disclosure date
Post-hoc data that may embed future information

pitSafeRule.rule: A FinancialReport row is PIT-available at asOfDate iff filingDate <= asOfDate
pitSafeRule.timezone: filingDate is Taiwan business day (Asia/Taipei); compare date portion only
pitSafeRule.inferenceRule: No inference of filingDate from periodEndDate is allowed. If filingDate is unavailable, the row MUST NOT be used.

disclosureCalendar.Q1_report_deadline: ~May 15 of same year (2 months after Mar 31 quarter end)
disclosureCalendar.Q2_report_deadline: ~Aug 14 of same year (2 months after Jun 30 quarter end)
disclosureCalendar.Q3_report_deadline: ~Nov 14 of same year (2 months after Sep 30 quarter end)
disclosureCalendar.Q4_annual_report_deadline: ~Mar 31 of following year (3 months after Dec 31 year end)
disclosureCalendar.note: Actual filingDate may be earlier than deadline. Capture MOPS 公告日期 per row.

validatorGates: symbol field non-empty and matches known universe
filingDate field is valid YYYY-MM-DD string
filingDate is after period end date (Q1 end Mar 31 → filingDate >= Apr 01)
filingDate is within plausible disclosure window (Q1 → no later than Jul 31)

conditions: source CSV files present in drop-zone
validator dry-run PASS (all validator gates pass)
filingDate range covers target asOfDate period
Back-test coverage analysis shows no leakage

forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT enter alphaScore until sourceStatus = AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE
Must NOT use periodEndDate as PIT gate under any circumstances
Must NOT import without explicit approval token
Must NOT infer filingDate from period end date or quarter label
Must NOT add outcome fields to the source CSV
Must NOT use restated financials without capturing the restatement date

fieldsToAdd.note: MOPS public disclosure date — PIT gate field

schemaChangesRequired.note: Schema changes are paper-design only in P29B. Actual migration requires separate P29C-DB or P30 phase with CTO approval.

disclaimer: Paper design only. Not for investment use. No performance claims.
